approvals.scope: Only scripts declared in security/network_policy.json may perform outbound requests.
approvals.reason: Network use is bounded to public GitHub metadata and benchmark discovery, with allowed hosts reviewed in security/network_policy.json.

target_enforcement.openai: metadata-only permission_contract in openai.yaml plus adapter.json
target_enforcement.vscode: adapter.json target_permission_contract plus VS Code workspace-trust note

approvals.scope: Local generated reports, registry metadata, temporary test outputs, and package artifacts under the skill workspace.
approvals.reason: File writes are required to create auditable reports, compiled target contracts, package artifacts, and local test fixtures; package safety checks exclude generated temp outputs from archives.

target_enforcement.openai: metadata-only permission_contract in openai.yaml plus adapter.json
target_enforcement.vscode: adapter.json target_permission_contract plus VS Code workspace-trust note

approvals.scope: Local deterministic validation, packaging, install simulation, and CI orchestration commands.
approvals.reason: Subprocess use is limited to local verification and packaging flows that are surfaced through CLI help smoke tests and CI targets.

target_enforcement.openai: metadata-only permission_contract in openai.yaml plus adapter.json
target_enforcement.vscode: adapter.json target_permission_contract plus VS Code workspace-trust note
